channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Response to vaccination and immune status after intrauterine exposure to immunomodulating drugs for maternal IBD.
item.description: NPJ vaccines - Guidelines on inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) recommend continuing immunomodulating drugs during pregnancy, but their effects on the infant immune system remain uncertain. In this observational st...
